x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Sufficient HR case history allows Now Assist to learn case patterns, generate accurate summaries, and power similar case suggestions. Low case volume produces generic AI outputs with minimal environment context.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow HR case volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: complete descriptions, proper categorization, and close notes. Target: 500+ HR cases in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c68
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Sufficient HR case history allows Now Assist to learn case patterns, generate accurate summaries, and power similar case suggestions. Low case volume produces generic AI outputs with minimal environment context.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>HR Case Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' HR cases created in last 12 months';

    if (total >= 500) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' HR cases in the last 12 months. Sufficient history for Now Assist HRSD AI summarization and similar case pattern learning.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' HR cases in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist HRSD AI learning will have limited pattern coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' HR cases in the last 12 months. Insufficient case history for Now Assist HRSD AI summarization and similar case matching.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>HRSD</module>
<number>CHK0006019</number>
<order>20</order>
<remediation_guidance>Allow HR case volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: complete descriptions, proper categorization, and close notes. Target: 500+ HR cases in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c68</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
